holdingsSubtitle: What you own and what you owe
recurringSubtitle: Your regular money in and out

allocate.editContextNote: Changes here update this plan only. To make permanent changes, go to

tooltips.committed: Expenses set up in Recurring that fall within this pay cycle.
tooltips.surplus: What's left after your committed expenses are covered.
tooltips.paydayPlan: Built from your income frequency and next payment date.

shortfall.label: Shortfall
shortfall.message: Your expenses exceed your income this pay cycle. Review your recurring expenses to balance your plan.

upcoming.heading: Your next plan
upcoming.helper: Amounts based on your current Recurring setup.

surplusDestination.setHelper: Your surplus will be allocated here in your plan. Change this any time.

budgetBreakdownTile.title: This pay cycle
budgetBreakdownTile.setUpIncomeHint: Set up income to get started
budgetBreakdownTile.emptyDescription: Add income and expenses to see your pay cycle breakdown.

netWorthNoHoldings.headline: Your net worth starts here.
netWorthNoHoldings.body: Add your assets and liabilities — property, shares, super, loans — and Supafolio will track how your wealth grows over time.

holdingsNoAssets.headline: Everything you own and owe, in one place.
holdingsNoAssets.body: Add your assets — property, shares, RSUs, super, crypto — and your liabilities — home loans, car loans, credit cards. Supafolio tracks the full picture.

holdingsNoLiabilities.body: Add your loans and liabilities to see your true net worth.

emptyStates.holdingsAssetTabEmpty: Add a {{category}} holding so it appears in this group.
emptyStates.holdingsLiabilityTabEmpty: Add a {{category}} liability so it appears in this group.

budgetNoIncome.body: Add an income source so Supafolio can calculate your surplus.

budgetNoExpenses.body: Add your regular commitments to complete your plan.

budgetNoExpensesNeedIncome.body: Add an income source so Supafolio can calculate your surplus.

allocateNoIncome.headline: Your plan starts with your income.
allocateNoIncome.body: Tell Supafolio when money arrives and Allocate will show you exactly where it needs to go.

allocateNoExpenses.headline: Almost there.
allocateNoExpenses.body: Add your regular commitments and Supafolio will show you your surplus — and where to put it.

allocateNoSuggestionsFallback.body: When income lands in one account and bills come from another, Supafolio will show the transfers that keep you covered.

snaptrade.trustCredentialsNote: Your login credentials are never stored in Supafolio.
snaptrade.syncErrorWithName: Couldn't sync {{brokerage}}. Your connection may have expired — reconnect to fix this.
snaptrade.syncErrorGeneric: Couldn't sync your brokerage. Your connection may have expired — reconnect to fix this.
snaptrade.disconnectBody: This will remove automatic sync for this account. Your existing balance data will be kept.
snaptrade.disconnectSuccessToast: Automatic brokerage sync is off for this holding.
snaptrade.disconnectErrorToast: Could not disconnect brokerage sync. Try again.
